generation.mode: new high-resolution raster derived from a local art-direction reference
generation.promptSummary: Three richly detailed front-facing 2.5D floating islands—ancient tree, crystal waterfall shrine, and fairytale castle—widely separated on solid chroma magenta with jagged layered rock undersides.

role: near-background orbital scenery only; never used as a playable platform
extraction: Chroma rejection followed by connected-component silhouette masks; each output is isolated by shape before trimming.
